intro: Rinorea guatemalensis, also known as Guatemala woodrose or wood rose, is a plant species belonging to the family Violaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include the treatment of fever, inflammation, and respiratory issues, making it a potential source of natural remedies for various health conditions. The bioactive constituents of Rinorea guatemalensis include alkaloids, flavonoids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Rinorea guatemalensis is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it is also used to make tinctures and extracts, which are used to treat various health ailments.
